name: Abyssal Baths
description:
You discover a secluded chamber.

Steam rises from bubbling pools of hot liquid that shifts colors with hypnotic rhythm. Barnacled growths hang from the ceiling, dripping viscous fluid that hisses and writhes when it touches the surface. The air feels heavy, laden with salt and something unmistakably organic.

As you approach the edge of the largest pool, the liquid ripples. The waters bubble more intensely as if anticipating your entry.

choices.name: Abstain
choices.description: Heal 10 HP.

choices.name: Immerse
choices.description: Gain 2 Max HP. Take 3 damage. Enter the baths.

pages.label: In the Baths
pages.description: You can keep lingering — each time you gain 2 Max HP but the damage increases by 1. If the next linger would kill you, the game warns you. Up to 10 times.

choices.name: Linger
choices.description: Gain 2 Max HP. Take damage (starts at 4, increases by 1 each time).

choices.name: Exit Baths
choices.description: Leave the baths.

LINGER:
The temperature keeps rising!

How long can you endure before the steam cooks you from within?

It keeps getting hotter!

The pool's bubbling sounds like laughter.

IT'S SO HOT!

You wonder if this is what it's like to live in the Village of Demons?
You have bathed so long you have lost track of time and your mind...

name: Amalgamator
description:
CLANG! CLANG!!!

You hear the echoes of metal upon metal on the otherside of a wall...

As you press your head against the wall to listen in—the wall opens up, revealing a hulking six-armed figure toiling away.
Its “face” is a swirling vortex of glowing sigils that shift about.

“One with an Ascending Spirit has found my workshop? Let's get COMBINING!”

choices.name: Combine Defends
choices.description: Remove 2 Defends. Add Ultimate Defend to your Deck.
choices.outcome:
CLANG! CLANG!!!

The Amalgamator strikes its Bone Anvil.

Memories of combat, protecting, and defensive strategies sharpen with each blow.
Your most ultimate technique returns to you.

choices.name: Combine Strikes
choices.description: Remove 2 Strikes. Add Ultimate Strike to your Deck.
choices.outcome:
CLANG! CLANG!!!

The Amalgamator strikes its Bone Anvil.

Memories of combat, attacking, and offensive strategies sharpen with each blow.
Your most ultimate technique returns to you.

name: Aroma of Chaos
description:
Upon trudging through a thick underbrush and making it into a clearing, you're hit with an unplaceable nostalgia.

A mix of floral scents, putrid decay, and something else entirely. The scent grows stronger with each step, and you feel as though the world around you is warping and twisting.

Overcome with a sense of shifting chaos[/rainbow], you begin to lose your sense of self.

choices.name: Let Go
choices.description: Transform a card in your Deck.
choices.outcome:
You give in and your mind drifts...
You see yourself communing with friends, fighting as a team, and dueling great foes. Is this a dream? Reality? Somehow both? Many sets of eyes perceive you and your dreams. Who are they...?

You awaken after an unknown amount of time.
The aroma weakens and its effects fade as you regain clarity. Upon restabilizing, you're more clearheaded than ever.

What were those eyes?

choices.name: Maintain Control
choices.description: Upgrade a card in your Deck.

name: Battleworn Dummy
description:
As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly!

“BZZZT! TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE 3 TURNS TO DEFEAT ME!
CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE LETHAL HUMILIATION.
Here are the options:”

After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions.

What do you choose?

choices.name: Setting 1
choices.description: Fight a 75 HP dummy. Procure 1 random Potion.

choices.name: Setting 2
choices.description: Fight a 150 HP dummy. Upgrade 2 random cards.

choices.name: Setting 3
choices.description: Fight a 300 HP dummy. Obtain a random Relic.

name: Brain Leech
description:
*thunk*

A sharp pain is felt atop your head and a thought stabs into your mind.

“SHARE KNOWLEDGE???”

You are unsure how to proceed...

choices.name: Rip the Leech Off
choices.description: Lose 5 HP. Gain a Colorless card reward.
choices.outcome:
You violently rip the leech off your head and chuck it far far away!

There's a voice in your head:
“NOOOOOOoOoooooOOOOoooo....”

choices.name: Share Knowledge
choices.description: Choose 1 of 5 random cards to add to your Deck.
choices.outcome:
“HOW OSTENTATIOUSLY SCHOLASTIC OF A LABYRINTHINE MIND!
A VERITABLE CORNUCOPIA OF CEREBRAL SUSTENANCE TO DIGEST!”.

Satisfied, the creature pops off and crawls away.
You are flabbergasted.

name: Bugslayer
description:
As you're fending off a swarm of aggressive insects you suddenly notice a Mighty Rugged Warrior-Man fighting beside you this whole time!

The insects, sensing defeat, scatter. You turn to your fellow fighter.
“Would you like any tips on exterminating these pests?”

How polite. You nod and accept his offer.

choices.name: Learn Extermination Technique
choices.description: Add Exterminate to your Deck.
choices.outcome:
“I see... you wish to learn the Extermination Technique. Very good...”

He pauses briefly, thinking how best to endow you with this maneuver...

“THIS IS THE TECHNIQUE! BEHOLD!!”
He boasts while holding up a can of Insecticide.

choices.name: Learn Squash Technique
choices.description: Add Squash to your Deck.
choices.outcome:
“I see... you wish to learn the Squash Technique. Very good...”

He pauses briefly, thinking how best to endow you with this maneuver...

“THIS IS THE TECHNIQUE! BEHOLD!!”
He boasts while stepping on a giant bug.

name: Byrdonis Nest
description:
You spot an enormous Shambling Beast chase off an injured Green Byrd.

In the alcove the byrd fled from, a single unguarded egg lies abandoned.

Your stomach gurgles...

choices.name: Eat the Egg
choices.description: Gain 7 Max HP.
choices.outcome:
You crack the egg open and gobble it up.
Good breakfast.

choices.name: Take the Egg
choices.description: Add Byrdonis Egg to your Deck.
choices.outcome: You gently scoop up the egg and stow it, thinking it may hatch into something useful later.

name: Colorful Philosophers
description:
Before you is a rather epic sight.
You see 3 different colored statues towering over a dais, having a heated debate over the philosophical implications of color.

As you listen in, you get a sense that the most important question at hand is which color truly is THE BEST.

You chime in with your thoughts.

choices.name: Blue
choices.description: Obtain 3 Defect cards.

choices.name: Equality
choices.description: Obtain Prismatic Shard.

choices.name: Red
choices.description: Obtain 3 Ironclad cards.

choices.name: Pink
choices.description: Obtain 3 Necrobinder cards.

choices.name: Orange
choices.description: Obtain 3 Regent cards.

choices.name: Green
choices.description: Obtain 3 Silent cards.

name: Colossal Flower
description:
There is a colossal flower growing atop a mountain of bones.

As its color-shifting petals[/rainbow] pulsate, you sense there is a Powerful Cluster of Pollen in the center but the undulating petals are razor sharp and unpredictable.

You could grab some of the golden nectar, but reaching the prize in the center is so tempting...

choices.name: Extract Nectar
choices.description: Gain X Gold.

choices.name: Reach Deeper
choices.description: Enter deeper. Lose 5 HP.

choices.name: Extract Nectar
choices.description: Gain 35 Gold.

choices.name: Reach Deeper
choices.description: Take 5 damage. Go deeper.

choices.name: Extract Nectar
choices.description: Gain 75 Gold.

choices.name: Reach Deeper
choices.description: Take 6 damage. Go even deeper.

choices.name: Extract Instead
choices.description: Gain 135 Gold.

choices.name: Obtain Pollinous Core
choices.description: Take 7 damage. Obtain the Pollinous Core relic.

name: Crystal Sphere
description:
“I predicted you'd enter...!”

A raspy voice calls out as you enter a mystic hut.

“Your destiny has brought you here. We must uncover your future and fortunes so you can SAVE US ALL!!”
“Okay, here are the options for the Crystal Sphere reading. Be sure to sign this waiver as well,” she says while bringing out pen and parchment.

choices.name: Payment Plan
choices.description: Gain a Debt. Divine 6 times.
choices.outcome: Payment Plan

choices.name: Uncover Future
choices.description: Pay 50 Gold. Divine 3 times.
choices.outcome: Uncover Future

name: Darv
description: Darv, the Hoarder, digs through a heap of powerful relics and presents a rotating stash. You are shown Dusty Tome plus three random relics drawn from the main pool and act-specific sets, with some options only appearing when their conditions are met.

dialogue.text: Here, take one of these forgotten gems with ya!
I’ve got things to do today! Take whatever ya want from that pile!!
You’re a beautiful hunk of junk, you know that?
Still keeping at it, I see... Let’s see if we can upgrade ya!
I’ve been holding on to your friend’s uhh... um. Nevermind nevermind!!
My scrappy scrapper, forget I said all that!
The flaming warrior has returned! I’ve got just the thing for ya!
Good to see ya still kickin’ and bashin’ em heads in!
I’m still holding on to that heavy blade of yours... but I can’t find no one to restore it.
Maybe the Architect knows somethin’.
I can tell you’re a serious one. What can I do for ya missy?
Very well then... have a gander!
Still on that warpath? I ain’t gonna stop ya!
This book seems tied to ya, been around longer than you have.
Scary things have a way of ending up in my collection.
What brings the likes of you up here? Wanna take a look at my collection?
Yeah!
Back for more your highness?!
To my new friend, do I have somethin’ for ya!
I’d give it but the Architect nabbed it from me!! Help a buddy out! Do me a favor will ya?
Back in the Spire for you too huh? Can’t resist those shinies right?!
I’ll trade ya somethin’ nice for that trophy you got there!
Pity ya don’t remember all my generosity! Yeah yeah, you know how Neow is...
Well! Let’s get you equipped for that final showdown or whatevah!
...where did I put... Oh! Come to see my collection!? Take anything from that pile over there, put it to good use!

name: Dense Vegetation
description:
Having taken the wrong path for a good while, you find yourself in a thick jungle of ferns, shrubs, and vines. Especially vines. Exhaustion sets in, and a dark thought comes to mind:

“You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching.”

What do you do?

choices.name: Rest
choices.description: Heal like resting at a Rest Site. Fight some enemies.

choices.name: Trudge On
choices.description: Remove a card from your Deck. Lose 11 HP.
choices.outcome:
You hack and slash your way through the jungle but it goes on and on...

You sustain yourself on strange fruits, crunchy bugs, and drink the nectar of glowing plants but you start feeling paranoid...

But then you find a clearing, a trail, and some drawings of maps on the ground.
Problem solved.

name: Doll Room
description:
You enter a hidden room...

It's packed with an array of dolls. Each are unique, their expressions ranging from joy to sorrow, their attire spanning centuries and realms beyond your own.

A chorus of whispers grows louder and louder until the dolls are shouting over each other and calling for you...

You must choose one and leave immediately.

choices.name: Examine Each and Make the Best Choice
choices.description: Lose 15 HP. Choose 1 of 3 Doll Relics.
choices.outcome:
You examine each and every doll before you make your choice.

The shouting has reached a piercing crescendo but you manage to make a choice before going completely mad!

choices.name: Pick at Random
choices.description: Obtain a random Doll Relic.

choices.name: Take Some Time
choices.description: Lose 5 HP. Choose 1 of 2 Doll Relics.
choices.outcome:
Amid the shouting, you quickly examine the dolls.

One of these two may be good?
It's hard to concentrate through the mental anguish.

name: Doors of Light and Dark
description:
A doorway existed where none existed moments before...

You enter to find two shimmering doorways and a well-dressed doorman.
“Finally, a visitor! Please please! Choose a door, any door!”

Are we still in the Spire? How is this place so clean?

choices.name: Dark Door
choices.description: Remove 1 card from your Deck.
choices.outcome:
Into the darkness...

You see nothing.
But this helps you think... You shed pointless thoughts.

You're back in the Underdocks.
How did you? Huh...?

choices.name: Light Door
choices.description: Upgrade 2 random cards.
choices.outcome:
Into the light...

It's blinding!! But the light strengthens you.

You're back in the Underdocks.
How did you? Huh...?

name: Drowning Beacon
description:
Crossing a dreamscape of rocks and still waters, you emerge to face a sinking lighthouse emitting anti-light.

You can bottle up the eerily-glowing water that has pooled here or climb up the dilapidated structure to retrieve the lens.

choices.name: Bottle
choices.description: Procure Glowwater Potion.
choices.outcome:
Using a nearby bottle, you calmly scoop up the glowing liquid as the lighthouse peacefully sinks into the mud.

Good thing you weren't in there.

choices.name: Climb
choices.description: Obtain Fresnel Lens. Lose 13 Max HP.
choices.outcome:
You climb to the top of the lighthouse, unnerved by its steady sinking.

Upon reaching the lanthorn room, you start prying off the lens as the anti-light saps your vitality!

Finally, you wring it free; the lighthouse stops sinking.

name: Endless Conveyor
description:
You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads:
“ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!”

Inside, a willowy multi-armed chef is deftly preparing bites of food and placing them onto a winding chitinous belt.

One of the chef's arms point to a sign:
35 Gold each

choices.name: Observe the Chef
choices.description: Upgrade a random card in your Deck.
choices.outcome:
Keeping your distance from a seat, you loiter in the shadows of the establishment's entrance.

The chef, unfazed, continues working. Studying this behavior and discipline, you seek to minimize unnecessary movement and emotion during combat.

name: The Merchant???
description: Placeholder

name: Field of Man-Sized Holes
description:
The sudden sight of a massive field, gouged with large outlines of bodies, stops you in your tracks.

One of these outlines matches your own.

It's perfect...

choices.name: Enter Your Hole
choices.description: Enchant a card with Perfect Fit.
choices.outcome:
It's a snug fit, but you squeeze yourself into the hole...

The further you go, the darker it becomes.
Eventually, you see a faint light grow brighter and reveal the other side.

You step out unchanged, but now understand the intimate secrets of life.

choices.name: Resist
choices.description: Remove 2 cards from your Deck. Add Normality to your Deck.
choices.outcome:
You walk past all the holes, even the one carved perfectly in your shape...

Why didn't I go inside? What would have happened? Have I been in that hole before? Who made these holes?

What is... who... where?

name: Grave of the Forgotten
description:
There is a single grave with a roiling blue flame...

A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it begging to journey with you.

But perhaps it's better for it to face the truth?

choices.name: Accept the Relic
choices.description: Obtain Forgotten Soul.
choices.outcome:
You place your hand on the grave and whisper...

“Ascend with me...”

In response, the flames draw out from the grave and coalesce into a burning soul and hover around you loyally.
It knows what you are, and wishes to escort you to your final destination.

choices.name: Confront with Truth
choices.description: Add Decay to your Deck. Enchant a card that Exhausts with Soul's Power.
choices.outcome:
You place your hand on the grave and whisper...

“Your fight is over...”

In response, the soul crashes into yours and a SOUL FIGHT ensues!
Stunned by the countless battles you have endured, it concedes.
choices.locked: You have no cards with Exhaust that can be Enchanted.

name: Hungry for Mushrooms
description:
How long has it been since you ate?
...wait, what's that fantastic smell?

Following the scent, you reach a cozy campground with all manner of tasty mushrooms being cooked! You don't consider the safety of eating these mushrooms because you are so hungry.
(So hungry that you don't notice the dead adventurer)

choices.name: Big Mushroom
choices.description: Obtain Big Mushroom.
choices.outcome:
You bite into the Big Mushroom. Its flesh is firm, starchy, and satisfying. The more you eat, the hungrier you become, as if the mushroom is feeding on your hunger.

So yummy... you enter a food coma.
This gluttony will cost you.

choices.name: Fragrant Mushroom
choices.description: Obtain Fragrant Mushroom. Lose 15 HP.
choices.outcome:
You sample the Fragrant One, a small woody mushroom with a delicate scent of shellfish...

A burst of energy spurs you to run, jump, and rigorously train!
Then, a sudden stabbing pain hits you as the living fungi struggles within you during its brief final moments.

name: Infested Automaton
description:
There's a chamber filled with dead robots.

A lone automaton still has a faintly glowing core but it's engulfed by a grotesque, organic growth and doesn't respond.

choices.name: Study
choices.description: Obtain a random Power.
choices.outcome:
By studying the Glowing Automaton and how its inner workings are laid out, you realize that specific metals and their arrangements resist various ailments!

You apply this Technology to yourself.

choices.name: Touch the Core
choices.description: Obtain a random 0 cost card.
choices.outcome:
At the slightest touch of the core, you are jolted by electricity.

You scamper away, feeling altered from the experience.

name: Jungle Maze Adventure
description:
In a clearing, you run into a Ragtag Group of Adventurers looking down and gesturing at a gigantic maze.

They offer to join forces with you in an Epic Quest to loot the riches of this maze. As an experienced adventurer yourself, it's clear this maze is filled with deadly traps and guardians.

It would be easier if you work together, but then you would have to split the loot.

choices.name: Join Forces
choices.description: Gain 50 Gold.
choices.outcome:
Everyone's face immediately lights up, including {IsMultiplayer:yours and your friends'|your own}!

One of the adventurers turns out to be a bard!
You merrily waltz into the maze as Aquid the squid wizard effortlessly disarms traps, while you and the Grathorian fighter take out the spiky club-wielding guards with ease.

This was the most joyous adventure of your life and you've made some truly Great Memories.

choices.name: Solo Quest
choices.description: Gain 150 Gold. Lose 18 HP.
choices.outcome:
Feeling misanthropic, you {IsMultiplayer:and your friends |}wordlessly walk past their now-frowning faces. One of them even shakes their fist at you.

The maze is not welcoming. You fall into a spike trap, you are struck by a massive log with spikes, and feisty creatures with spiky clubs fight you along the entire journey.

You are sick of spikes, and consider teamwork for the next adventure.

name: The Lost Wisp
description:
In the distance is an odd sight. Mounds and mounds of deceased insects, surrounding what looks to be a small glowing mote.
It seems to be an effective attractant for all manner of bugs but you see it lash out some flames!

You move closer to investigate.

choices.name: Capture the Wisp
choices.description: Add Decay to your Deck. Obtain the Relic.
choices.outcome:
You approach the Wisp cautiously...
The closer you get, the more it reacts to your presence.

When in arm's reach, you grasp the Wisp but it scalds you with a blast of hot steam and flame!

Still, you fumble and wrestle the creature into submission. Eventually, the Wisp concedes and recognizes you as its new owner.
choices.locked: Your Max HP is too low.

choices.name: Search the Nearby Area
choices.description: Gain 60 Gold.
choices.outcome:
You decide to leave the little one alone. Better play it safe!

Not much is in the area, but you find some gold scattered amongst the dead bugs.
You don't seek an answer.

name: Luminous Choir
description:
You stumble upon a clearing bathed in an unnatural blue glow. Towering mushrooms pulse with bioluminescence, their caps swollen and glistening. As you approach, the fungi begin to emit haunting, melodic tones that reverberate throughout your chest.

You notice something gleaming, embedded within the largest mushroom's flesh, pulsing in rhythm with the fungal song.

choices.name: Offer Tribute
choices.description: Pay 149 Gold. Obtain a random Relic.
choices.outcome: Placing gold upon the spongy ground. The coins slowly sink as tendrils gently push the relic to the surface, allowing a clean retrieval.

choices.name: Reach into the Flesh
choices.description: Remove 2 cards from your Deck. Add Spore Mind to your Deck.
choices.outcome: You plunge your hand directly into the spongy tissue of the dominant mushroom to extract the relic within. The fungal network shudders at your intrusion, and your mind quivers in response.

name: Morphic Grove
description:
You enter a grove of crystalline trees, and they begin to quiver excitedly!
A chorus of hellos and welcomes bombard you as a group of Morphics burst forth from trees.

One of the Morphics is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.

Approach the group or the loner?

choices.name: Group
choices.description: Lose 100 Gold. Transform 2 cards.
choices.outcome:
You greet the chittering Morphics and they embrace you into their crystally arms.

They share their combined knowledge and inject you with Morphic Magic, changing your nature... Such lovely creatures, these Morphics.

One of them stole your gold.

choices.name: Loner
choices.description: Gain 5 Max HP.
choices.outcome:
You reach out a hand to the lone Morphic, sympathizing with its nature.
It gifts you a tiny crystal fruit, and you consume it, as is custom.

The fruit clarifies your mind and purpose. You give thanks, then make your way onwards.

name: Neow
description: Neow, the Mother of Resurrection, awaits at the start of each run. She offers three blessings — two positive and one cursed. The options are drawn randomly from the pools below.

choices.name: Arcane Scroll
choices.description: Upon pickup, obtain a random Rare Card to add to your Deck.

choices.name: Booming Conch
choices.description: At the start of Elite combats, draw 2 additional cards.

choices.name: Pomander
choices.description: Upon pickup, Upgrade a card.

choices.name: Golden Pearl
choices.description: Upon pickup, gain 150 Gold.

choices.name: Lead Paperweight
choices.description: Upon pickup, choose 1 of 2 Colorless cards to add to your Deck.

choices.name: New Leaf
choices.description: Upon pickup, Transform 1 card.

choices.name: Neow's Torment
choices.description: Upon pickup, add 1 Neow's Fury to your Deck.

choices.name: Precise Scissors
choices.description: Upon pickup, remove 1 card from your Deck.

choices.name: Lost Coffer
choices.description: Upon pickup, gain 1 card reward and procure 1 random potion.

choices.name: Cursed Pearl
choices.description: Upon pickup, receive Greed. Gain 333 Gold.

choices.name: Large Capsule
choices.description: Upon pickup, obtain 2 random Relics. Add an additional Strike and Defend to your Deck.

choices.name: Leafy Poultice
choices.description: Upon pickup, Transform 1 of your Strikes and 1 of your Defends and lose 10 Max HP.

choices.name: Precarious Shears
choices.description: Upon pickup, remove 2 cards from your Deck and take 13 damage.

choices.name: Nutritious Oyster
choices.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 11.

choices.name: Stone Humidifier
choices.description: Whenever you Rest at a Rest Site, raise your Max HP by 5.

choices.name: Massive Scroll
choices.description: Upon pickup, choose 1 of 3 Multiplayer Cards to add to your Deck.

choices.name: Lava Rock
choices.description: The Act 1 Boss drops 2 Relics.

choices.name: Small Capsule
choices.description: Upon pickup, obtain a random Relic.

choices.name: Silver Crucible
choices.description: The first 3 card rewards you see are Upgraded. The first Treasure Chest you open is empty.

choices.name: Scroll Boxes
choices.description: Upon pickup, lose all Gold and choose 1 of 2 packs of cards to add to your Deck.

dialogue.text: ...hello... ..again.....
...awaken... ..Awaken.....
..receive.... this.... ..blessing.. ...go......
..I’ve... ..brought... ..you back...
...kill.. the... ARCHITECT
...construct.. what... ....have you.. become...?
...he.. can... ....fix.. you.. ...everything....
...I.. can’t... ..make... ...you.. forget....
..arise.. my.. warrior... ..time... to fight...again...
..still.. lost.. to rage... good...
..remember.. the.. first..time ...you ..came...before me..
..so..furious...
...so..useful...
...we.... share... ..the same... ..goal....
...my power..... is yours...
He... still.. ....breathes...
... Architect.... ..weakening.... ..we.... stronger...
..cute... ...you... will see.. ..me... ...again....
...again..?
...receive.. this... ..blessing...
...returned.. from... outside? ..knew... you’d... be back...
...your..  ...trophy.. awaits...
..both...know..agony..of..family...
..still...seeking..approval...? ...FOOLISH...
I’ve... remade you.... ...go... ..up.....

name: Nonupeipe
description: Nonupeipe, Serendipity Incarnate, surrounds you with a glittering collection of lucky treasures. Each visit offers three random relics from the main pool, with Beautiful Bracelet appearing only when its special condition is met.

dialogue.text: Madness awaits at the top. Don my power and vanquish.
You’ve traveled so far to reach me! Come closer, receive my blessing.
Could a construct truly be worthy of my blessings? Come forward, Defect. You will be the most beautiful of all automata.
My poor, battered machine, let me refine you.
I usually don’t like the Architect’s things, but I admit you’re growing on me.
Ah, the Ironclad finally arrives before me. Come forth and I shall endow you with my power.
Ironclad ironclad... was my previous gift not enough?
You return again my champion? How many times? Were you not strong enough to wipe out entire clans before?
I appreciate someone capable and shall grant a measure of my power. Next time, don’t kill my guards.
A mage needs fine accouterments for battle. Come forth, Necrobinder.
The Architect won’t be pleased to see that pet of yours.
Such beautiful robes you’ve brought from faraway lands! Have your minions bring you closer and I will bless thee.
Royal blessings for royal visitors. Servants! Fetch some tea for us.
The Architect has gone mad! If only a noble champion could save us from this plight...
A little thief has snuck into my domain? Don’t think I can’t see you? Come on out!
A huntress, what beckons your return to the Spire? Approach and don these blessings.
I have prepared gifts for you, assassin, don’t be shy.
Of all of her puppets, you surprise me most.
What took your first life? Did Neow find you? A shame you don’t speak.
I haven’t had a visitor in a millennia! You’re looking quite drab, here, let’s find something delightful for you to wear.

name: Orobas
description: Orobas, the Living Rainbow, spreads a spectrum of relics across three distinct pools. Each encounter offers one relic from each pool, with Prismatic Gem joining the selection for characters who can channel Orbs.

dialogue.text: Try this!!!
Very good finds!! Look look!
What! Servant construct?! Still working!! Why here? Why not at Factory??
Shiny orbs! How work? Ouch!!
Core broken? Neow use broken construct? Manipulated?
Architect fix you?
An Ironclad!? How possible?? Scary. Very scary!!
Contract signer? Why!? Bad choice? Yes. Mistake!
Wishing you freedom!! Wishing hard! Vakuu bad. Very bad! Architect free you?
Dead?! Not dead! Why puppet? Big hand!!
Killing bad!! Take this instead!
Not dead one! Good gifts for you!! Violence bad.
No violence! Collect shiny instead... Shiny!!
Architect not bad! Maybe talk? Talking good!! Very good!
Traveller! From space!? Where in space? How from space? Pointy head! Little friends!!
Exciting! Impressive!! More! More!!!
More stories! Found these for you! Now tell more story!!
Stories?!
Infection...? BLIGHT!? Take and go!!
Not contagious? Very dying? Architect help you?
Where sisters? Scary mean sisters! Be good person! Don’t be like sisters!!
Puppet puppet!! All the way up here?! Take these, take take!

name: Pael
description: Pael, the Melting Dragon, offers three relic choices drawn from twisting pools of flesh, wing, and eye. Each visit presents one relic from Pool 1, one from Pool 2, and one from Pool 3, with extra options appearing when your deck or companions meet Pael's peculiar conditions.

dialogue.text: Welcome back friend. Let my flesh help you...
Pael is sleeping. His snoring shakes the room.
Troubled automaton, looking for your friend? Let me help...
Do constructs dream? Watch and copy me...
I dreamt of your friend... Father can restore Flaw...
You contain such rage. Take from me and find some peace...
Do you remember how it feels to dream? It is good to sleep...
You must quell your flames. Father can free you...
Such malice paints your heart.
There is no peace on your path. Take a part of me to ease your burdens...
The one with the Hand returns. Painful memories. Take my strength and leave...
Killing Father won’t bring peace.
We do not choose our family...
Quiet down now. Take a part of me and be on your way...
Why not give when I have an abundance of flesh?
When you return, I will be replenished anew. That’s what sleep does...
Murderous creature, no need for violence here. Have part of me and find peace...
Trophy hunting? Sure, take a part of me... Whatever grants you comfort...
You’ve poisoned me...? What is this going to...? zZZzz...
A puppet has arrived? Can you check on Father? I’m too tired...

name: Potion Courier
description:
There is a sour smell in the air and shortly after, you find a Potion Courier collapsed on the ground.
Unmoving. Lifeless. Dead!?
While their belongings have been ransacked, there is a batch of Foul Smelling Potions with a note: "Recipient: Merchant".

choices.name: Grab Potions
choices.description: Procure 3 Foul Potions.
choices.outcome: What could the Merchant want with these potions?

choices.name: Ransack
choices.description: Procure 1 random Uncommon Potion.
choices.outcome: Only a single potion was intact.

name: Punch Off
description:
Two Punch Constructs are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...

Should you try to nab it?

choices.name: I Can Take Them
choices.description: Fight them for Greater Rewards.

choices.name: Nab
choices.description: Add Injury to your Deck. Obtain a random Relic.
choices.outcome:
You successfully nab the relic!

...or so you thought. A right-hook clocks you in the face.

name: Ranwid the Elder
description:
You are approached by the oldest person you have ever seen.
“We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!”

You do not know this man.

choices.name: Give X Gold
choices.description: Obtain a random Relic.
choices.outcome:
“Mag.. nificent...”

Ranwid mumbles while chewing the gold.

choices.name: Give Potion
choices.description: Obtain a random Relic.
choices.outcome:
“Exquisite...”

Glup glup glup

He downs the {Potion} in one go.
choices.locked: You don't have any Potions that can be given.

choices.name: Give Relic
choices.description: Obtain 2 random Relics.
choices.outcome:
“Exemplary...”

Ranwid observes the relic studiously for several minutes...

Then eats the {Relic}.
choices.locked: You don't have any Relics that can be given.

name: Reflections snoitcelfeR
description:
What is this? Something feels wrong here...
...ereh gnorw sleef gnihtemoS ?siht si tahW

choices.name: Shatter
choices.description: Duplicate your Deck. Receive Bad Luck.
choices.outcome:
You concentrate and identify a giant seamless mirror in front of you.
With a swift kick you SHATTER the giant mirror!
Right as you shatter the mirror your reflection braces {pronounObject}self as {pronounSubject} becomes a thousand beautiful glittering shards.

How can a place like this exist?

choices.name: Touch a Mirror
choices.description: Downgrade 2 random cards. Upgrade 4 random cards.
choices.outcome:
You reach forth and meld into the reflection in front of you.
Which one am I?

name: Relic Trader
description:
You turn a corner and suddenly, a shadowy figure is just standing there. He pivots to face you.

“Welcome! What're ya trading?”
The figure inquires as he flares open his cloak to reveal a slew of suspicious wares.

choices.name: Take the Bottom One
choices.description: Trade your Relic for a new Relic.

choices.name: Take the Middle One
choices.description: Trade your Relic for a new Relic.

choices.name: Take the Top One
choices.description: Trade your Relic for a new Relic.

name: Room Full of Cheese
description:
This room is full of cheese!!!

You look around to see if there are any traps and above you is... more cheese. The candles in this room appear to be made of cheese. The furniture is also cheese.
Suddenly, the door behind you slams shut.

It is made of cheese.

choices.name: Gorge
choices.description: Choose 2 of 8 random Common cards to add to your Deck.
choices.outcome:
You take a little nibble of cheese but this fuels you to eat even more cheese.

Time passes...

 You have eaten an awe-inspiring amount of cheese.
Tonight, dreams will be cheese.

choices.name: Search
choices.description: Lose 14 HP. Obtain the Chosen Cheese.
choices.outcome:
You scrounge about for hours and hours...

Time slips by as your mind travels to strange places from the sheer presence of all this cheese, and you fade into a stupor....
You snap awake and realize you're holding something.

The Chosen Cheese.

name: The Round Tea Party
description:
You find an invitation for a “Sir Galalot” to a tea party and decide to show up in his stead.

Upon entering an unassuming rotunda, you find yourself in the midst of commanders, generals, warlords, and mercenaries having... tea?
The gigantic knight donning a golden crown speaks.

“Thou art late for Tea?!”

choices.name: Enjoy Your Tea
choices.description: Obtain Royal Poison. Heal to full HP.
choices.outcome:
You grab a teacup and down it one go.
It's SCALDING HOT but you don't change your expression. The patrons are stunned by your lack of self preservation.

“We meant no offense, Sir Galalot. our sincerest apologies.”

You enjoy some tea and crumpets, unaware of the poison you've ingested.

choices.name: Pick a Fight
choices.description: Lose 11 HP. Obtain a random Relic.

name: Sapphire Seed
description:
You narrowly avoid stepping on a bright, sharp... seed? Its unmistakable color gives away that it's a Sapphire Seed! Weren't these incredible seeds supposed to be extinct!?

Legends say that consuming one can greatly amplify your endurance, but what if you plant and nourish it instead?

choices.name: Consume
choices.description: Heal 9 HP. Upgrade a card in your Deck.
choices.outcome:
You ingest the Sapphire Seed and within moments your limbs feel more agile, colors sharpen, and you sense the souls of nearby foes.

Good thing you didn't step on it.

choices.name: Plant and Nourish
choices.description: Enchant a card with Sown.
choices.outcome:
You scour the Overgrowth and find a pot with good aeration. Then, you trek around, searching for an untouched spot where light peeks through a cracked wall. Carefully, you reinforce the pot with bark and vine to camouflage it, fill it with loamy, nutrient-rich soil, and nestle the seed just beneath the surface.

Finally, you gather dew from nearby plants and pour it over the soil.

Grow big, little seed...
Unknowingly, the Sapphire Seed attaches to you spiritually.
Thankful of your hard work.

name: Self-Help Book
description:
On the floor lies a tome,
“Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire”

The book is encrusted with blood so you find this manuscript highly suspicious.

Will you read it?

choices.name: Move On
choices.description: You don't have any cards that can be Enchanted.
choices.outcome: You don't particularly care for books, let alone blood-encrusted ones.

choices.name: Read the Entire Book
choices.description: Choose a Power to Enchant with Swift 2.
choices.outcome:
What an engrossing read! Some choice quotes remain fresh in your mind:
“Avoid big monsters.”
“Take every card.”
“Blocking is for cowards.”

Your hands are covered in blood.
choices.locked: You don't have any Powers that can be Enchanted.

choices.name: Read a Random Passage
choices.description: Choose a Skill to Enchant with Nimble 2.
choices.outcome:
You flip to a random page:
“Defense 101: Don't get hit!”

You read the rest of the passage and it's surprisingly illuminating. You incorporate these ideas into your battle tactics.
choices.locked: You don't have any Skills that can be Enchanted.

choices.name: Read the Back
choices.description: Choose an Attack to Enchant with Sharp 2.
choices.outcome:
You flip the book over and read the summary:
“Critics and Cultists agree that sharp and pointy weapons are the best way to inflict damage!”

There's a price sticker on the back of the book, crossed out and marked with a greatly reduced price.
choices.locked: You don't have any Attacks that can be Enchanted.

name: Slippery Bridge
description: While crossing a rickety wooden bridge, there is a sudden torrent of rain. Massive gusts of wind buffet you, threatening to end your journey.

choices.name: Hold On
choices.description: Lose X HP. The card in the above option is randomized.

choices.name: Overcome
choices.description: A random card is removed from your Deck.
choices.outcome: I hate bridges.

name: Spiraling Whirlpool
description:
You happen upon a Massive Spiraling Whirlpool. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......

What do you do?

choices.name: Drink
choices.description: Heal 0 HP.
choices.outcome:
You cup your hands and dip it into the Spiraling Whirlpool.

Its waters fill your hands at a gentle rate as you take small sips with your eyes closed.

Delicious water spirals through you to your Center, washing away harmful thoughts and physical ailments...

choices.name: Observe
choices.description: Enchant a Strike or Defend with Spiral.
choices.outcome:
...ah-   so beautiful.....
So it spins... still spinning around. Yes...
Oh! Was that..... a little splash...?
....of course. You deserve some fun, too Mr. Spiral... haha...
... .......   ...

It's time to go now.
You whisper something as you take your leave.

“Thank you, Spiral.”

choices.name: Reach In
choices.description: Obtain a random Relic. Add Writhe to your Deck.
choices.outcome:
Foolishly, you plunge your arm into the center of the Spiraling Whirlpool, disrupting the equilibrium. The water becomes frigid and grasps you, carving Invisible Spirals into your arm.

Your fingers brush against something solid, and you grasp around in pain to finally wrestle a Relic out of there!

name: Spirit Grafter
description:
Above, a cocoon is shaking and wriggling, about to burst forth!

...it stops wriggling. The cocoon ignites! What is going on?
In a flash of light and flame, a Spirit Grafter rushes into you, threatening to merge with your being to become complete.

choices.name: Let It In
choices.description: Heal 25 HP. Add Metamorphosis to your Deck.
choices.outcome:
The Spirit Grafter merges with you. The vital kindred spirit swiftly heals you up.

You are reborn.

choices.name: Rejection
choices.description: Lose 9 HP. Remove a card from your Deck.
choices.outcome:
The Spirit Grafter is easily stopped by your will.

However, it repeatedly flies into you, desperate for a host. Its strength runs out and it dissolves with a poof.

A fleeting spirit.

name: Stone of All Time
description:
A massive boulder sits in the middle of an abandoned courtyard.

A plaque reads:
Stone of All Time.

Its presence, shape, and adornments indicate that this courtyard was built around this Stone and that it has never moved from this spot.

choices.name: Drink and Lift
choices.description: Lose a random Potion. Gain 10 Max HP.
choices.outcome:
You slam the {DrinkRandomPotion} down and lift with all your might!!

Nothing happens.

choices.name: Push
choices.description: Lose 6 HP. Enchant an Attack with Vigorous 8.
choices.outcome:
You push and push with everything you've got!!

Nothing happens.

name: The Sunken Statue
description:
You spot an aged statue half submerged in a pond; its hands gently rest atop a stone sword.

Something is also glittering at the bottom of the pond.
Votive offerings perhaps?

You could really use some money...

choices.name: Dive into the Water
choices.description: Gain 111 Gold. Lose 7 HP.
choices.outcome:
You plunge deep into the water!

While collecting the offerings you hear a dull echo and you're struck by stones!

Once you surface, you see that the old statue had crumbled due to your disturbance; physical and spiritual.

choices.name: Grab the Sword
choices.description: Obtain the Sword of Stone.
choices.outcome:
You wrest the sword out of the statue's hands and the whole thing crumbles apart!

It's too dangerous to pick up whatever was glittering at the bottom of the pond now...

Inspecting the sword, you sense an incredible dormant power within.

name: Sunken Treasury
description:
A path leads you into a partially submerged vault.
There are 2 chests but only 1 brittle key.

The First Chest: Shaking it, you get jingly-jangly noises. Bit of gold.
The Second Chest: Enormous, ornate, and clearly cursed. Lots of gold!

choices.name: First Chest
choices.description: Gain 60 Gold.
choices.outcome: Yup, there was gold in it.

choices.name: Second Chest
choices.description: Gain 333 Gold. Receive Greed.
choices.outcome:
You've never seen so much gold in one place!

All of the Merchant's wares can be bought...
{Monologue}
Dangerous thugs can be paid off...

The feverishly greedy thoughts stay with you forever...

name: Symbiote
description:
Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.

Approach...

choices.name: Approach
choices.description: Enchant an Attack with Corrupted.
choices.outcome:
It suddenly jumps onto you. You feel a searing pain as it latches onto your arm, but in an instant it is gone.

...? Where did it go?
choices.locked: None of your Attacks can be Enchanted.

choices.name: Kill with Fire
choices.description: Choose a card to Transform.
choices.outcome:
You torch the dark polyp. As it screeches and burns into ashes, your head pulses painfully but you manage not to faint.
What was that thing?

name: Tablet of Truth
description:
You defeat a pair of Guardian Kin and make your way into a protected vault.

Inside is a tablet with familiar inscriptions. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.

The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its healing energies instead.

choices.name: Decipher
choices.description: Lose 3 Max HP. Upgrade a random card.

choices.name: Smash
choices.description: Heal 20 HP.
choices.outcome:
The tablet is smashed to pieces, energy expelled from the tablet seeps into your body.

You feel refreshed!

name: Tanx
description: Tanx, the Khimera King, arms you from a brutal cache of weapons. Each meeting offers three random relics from Tanx's arsenal, with Tri-Boomerang added when you already carry enough weapons to impress the king.

dialogue.text: GROW STRONGER SO WE CAN FIGHT!!!
YOU CAN NEVER HAVE TOO MANY WEAPONS!!
CONSTRUCT! NO WEAPONS!? HAVE THIS!
ORBS ARE NOT WEAPONS!!
FIGHT ME, DEFECT!!
ORBS ARE WEAPONS!?
IMPRESSIVE SWORD, WARRIOR! YOU CAN USE MORE WEAPONS!
WEAPONS FOR THE WARRIOR! GRAB A WEAPON! LET’S FIGHT!
FIGHT ME, IRONCLAD!!
YEEES!! MIGHTY FIGHT, TAKE WEAPON!
WHAT A MIGHTY SCYTHE!
DOES THE HAND NEED A WEAPON!?
FIGHT ME, OSTY!!
FIGHT ME, NECROBINDER!!
MIGHTY TEAMWORK!! HAVE A WEAPON!
ORANGE!? HOW IS THIS BEING ORANGE!??
INCREDIBLE! SO MIGHTY!!
ORANGE ONE!! CHOOSE A MIGHTY WEAPON!
FIGHT ME, REGENT!!
FIGHT ME AGAIN!!
A HUNTRESS! I WILL SHARPEN YOUR CLAW!!
WHY DAGGERS!! UNMIGHTY!
FIGHT ME, SILENT!!
WHERE DID YOU GO!!!
SO WEAK! BUT YOU HAVE POTENTIAL! USE THIS WEAPON!!

name: Tea Master
description:
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.

The man inside gestures to a selection of teas, each neatly labeled with a premium price.

choices.name: Bone Tea
choices.description: Pay 50 Gold. Bone Tea

choices.name: Ember Tea
choices.description: Pay 150 Gold. Ember Tea

choices.name: Tea of Discourtesy
choices.description: Tea of Discourtesy
choices.outcome:
You politely decline the tea and—

*SLAM*

The door behind you slams shut. The tea master stares at you for a moment, then presents an ugly cup.
Oh, this tea is for the discourteous...

name: Tezcatara
description: Tezcatara, It Which Feeds the Fire, sets out gifts in three carefully prepared pools. Each encounter offers one relic from each pool, ranging from comforting treats to strange keepsakes and treasured curios.

dialogue.text: Welcome back, sweetie. Let me burn away your flaws.
Do come in, dear! What can Tezcatara do for you today?
Not here to annoy me? What an unusual little construct...
Now how silly would it be if he were unmade by one of his own?
Are you sure you want to be fixed up?
Well, if you’re really certain.
You burn so pretty! Come in, come in!
Such a strong boy you are! Come and eat something. Can’t slaughter on an empty stomach!
Ohh, Architect still alive? Kill him quickly would you? I’ll be waiting right here!
Now what’s a skeleton doing inside these walls?
Wonderful!
Come in, come in! Let’s make your flames burn brighter.
Those flames around you remind me of something forbidden.
I know who wrote that book.
Oh my, what an exotic visitor! Who might you be, sweetie?
Where are my manners? Tezcatara cackles with delight.
You and your friends are back again? I’ve made treats for you!
Welcome back regal boy! Looks like you’re doing great out there.
We all need to learn from our mistakes.
Come closer, quiet one. I can’t see well...
You can trust me.
Such a nasty sickness you have. Let’s take care of you.
I’ve met your sisters, you know? Such lovely girls they are.
Oh dear... you haven’t been fighting have you?
Oh, a visitor! Do come in, dear! What can Tezcatara do for you?

name: The Architect
description: The Architect awaits at the end of each successful run. The encounter plays out as a dialogue with character-specific lines, culminating in a final confrontation.

dialogue.text: What are you doing here?
Repair you? Make me.
You’re back? Didn’t I dismantle you?
Fix you? Fix your friend? Ridiculous.
How do you keep coming back? Is this Neow’s doing?
Foolish
So the arch demon’s thrall has arrived?
Cursed to fight forever, aren’t you?
Do you even know your name?
I pity you.
Return to the bottom, Ironclad.
Vengeance is it? No thank you.
You cannot change the past with anger.
I did what I must to maintain order.
Life
I need quiet...
The loud fool returns?
Something we can both agree on.
Not even an introduction?
Where did you come from? What are you after?
Hrrgh! DIE!!
Annoying wretch! BE GONE!!

name: The Future of Potions?
description:
You feel a faint rumbling as you round the corner to discover a gigantic spinning apparatus! It has several slots which appear to convert liquids into a highly compressed digestible tablet.

The idea of turning these health tonics into a tiny morsel is uncomfortable but perhaps it's good to try new things?

Up to 3 choices are offered — one for each potion you're carrying. This event only appears if you have at least 2 potions.

choices.name: Insert Common Potion
choices.description: Lose the potion. Choose 1 of 3 Upgraded Common cards (Attack or Skill).

choices.name: Insert Uncommon Potion
choices.description: Lose the potion. Choose 1 of 3 Upgraded Uncommon cards (Attack, Skill, or Power).

choices.name: Insert Rare Potion
choices.description: Lose the potion. Choose 1 of 3 Upgraded Rare cards (Attack, Skill, or Power).

name: The Lantern Key
description:
You come upon a faintly glowing key and go to pick it up.

“Been looking all over for that key! Now if you don't mind...”

 This person looks like bad news but maybe it's not good to be judgy.

choices.name: Keep the Key
choices.description: Fight to obtain the Key.

choices.name: Return the Key
choices.description: Gain 100 Gold.

name: The Legends Were True
description:
Entering into a pitch dark chamber, a sudden light pierces the darkness from above, just as the door slams behind you.

Illuminated before you appears to be a podium with a map on it. You feel compelled to take it.

Suspicious.

choices.name: Nab the Map
choices.description: Receive the Spoils Map.
choices.outcome: What's the worst that could happen? As you grab the map, an opening appears before you on the other side of the room.

choices.name: Slowly Find an Exit
choices.description: Lose 8 HP. Procure 1 random Potion.
choices.outcome:
As you sneak around the dark, looking for a way out the room starts to violently shake. With a sudden crash, the entire chamber collapses around you.

Barely making it out of the rubble, you find a vial of something useful that must have been hidden in the room.

name: This or That?
description:
Arms suddenly jut out from a nearby hole, clutching a suspicious bag of riches and a clearly cursed relic.

“This... or That?”
a scratched-up voice whispers from below.

choices.name: That
choices.description: Add Clumsy to your Deck. Obtain a random Relic.
choices.outcome:
You grab the Cursed Relic. As soon as you grasp it, shackles materialize on your wrists.

You hear a ghostly laughter and a bright plume of fire fills your vision!

The hole and arms are gone.

choices.name: This
choices.description: Lose 6 HP. Gain 0 Gold.
choices.outcome:
You grab the bag and as soon as you do, a THIRD hand appears and clutches at you!!

After a frantic struggle, it releases—the arms and the hole have vanished.

name: Tinker Time
description:
Navigating through an endless sea of corpses, you find a mad scientist scavenging for various scraps.

“Yes. Hi, hello! You look like a capable fighter... I need a tester for my next atrocity device! How about it?”

choices.name: Weapon
choices.description: Create an Attack. (Deal 12 damage.)

choices.name: Protector
choices.description: Create a Skill. (Gain 8 Block.)

choices.name: Gadget
choices.description: Create a Power.

pages.label: Choose Rider Effect
pages.description: 2 of 3 effects are offered randomly, based on the card type chosen.

choices.name: Sapping
choices.description: Apply 2 Weak. Apply 2 Vulnerable.

choices.name: Violence
choices.description: Hits 2 additional times.

choices.name: Choking
choices.description: Whenever you play a card this turn, the enemy loses 6 HP.

choices.name: Energized
choices.description: Gain [E][E].

choices.name: Wisdom
choices.description: Draw 3 cards.

choices.name: Chaos
choices.description: Add a random card into your Hand. It costs 0 [E] this turn.

choices.name: Expertise
choices.description: Gain 2 Strength. Gain 2 Dexterity.

choices.name: Curious
choices.description: Powers cost 1 [E] less.

choices.name: Improvement
choices.description: At the end of combat, Upgrade a random card.

name: Trash Heap
description:
You discover a towering pile of scrapped weapons, discarded trinkets, and other oddities. The massive pile shifts and rumbles, as if growing from within...

If you scavenge from the surface, you may find some decent things. But if you really get in there, you may find some exotic treasures.

choices.name: Dive In
choices.description: Lose 8 HP. Obtain a random forgotten Relic from the past.
choices.outcome:
You spend a decent amount of time wading through the dangerous garbage and find a relic of the past!

Why was this thrown out?

choices.name: Grab Random Junk
choices.description: Gain 100 Gold. Obtain a random forgotten card from the past.
choices.outcome:
You walk around the pile from a safe distance and pick up some forgotten valuables and oddities here and there.

Why were these created in the first place?

name: The Trial
description:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.

As you pass under a golden archway, horns blare, confetti explodes, and streamers glide down from the ceiling!

“Entrant ?, you are the DECIDER for today's Trial.”

choices.name: Accept
choices.description: Serve as today's Decider.

choices.name: Reject
choices.description: You are not allowed to Reject.

name: Unrest Site
description:
You find a secluded Rest Site and start a fire to get some rest.
Or so you thought.

Once the fire is started, it begins to swell, reaching not upwards but sideways towards a grove of oil-seeping trees.

Should you try resting anyways?

choices.name: Kill the Trees
choices.description: Lose 8 Max HP. Obtain a random Relic.
choices.outcome:
These trees are clearly malicious so you decide to get rid of them.
Days later, you're covered in ash and oily goop.

A massive flock of little byrd spirits rise from the slain trees and drop a small box at your feet.
“Thank you for freeing us from those trees... cheep cheep!”

You should really sleep more.

choices.name: Rest Anyways
choices.description: Heal to full HP. Receive Poor Sleep.
choices.outcome:
All this adventuring has left you exhausted, and despite the oddities, you decide to sleep.

You toss and turn as the fire roars and crackles through the night. The disgusting trees give off a wretched scent from their pitch-black sap.

You wake up, recovered, but not replenished.

name: Vakuu
description: Vakuu, the First Demon, tempts you with relics sorted into three ominous pools. Each encounter offers one relic from each pool, mixing bloody bargains, preserved trophies, and elegant demonic finery.

dialogue.text: Seeking glory in the Spire are we? I have some propositions for you...
143. 143 times you’ve been here.
You realize this never ends?
Broken one, let me perfect you.
Do you find it strange that your fellow constructs want you dead?
If you bring me the Architect’s heart, I will restore your companion.
What’s more important? Your creator or your friend?
Imagine seeing you again after so long.
Exactly what you bargained for.
Do the lost tribes weigh on you...? Vakuu howls with laughter.
My puppet of puppets... why haven’t you killed the Architect yet?
Yawn I look forward to watching you fail.
We both seek vengeance. It will have a cost to pay.
I know where you got that Hand.
The Architect has gravely wounded us both.
Straight to business. Very well...
A being from the stars? Within these accursed walls?
Yes, I think we can help each other.
More of my power can be yours for a small price.
You read the contracts thoroughly have you not? You have signed them with full intent and responsibility no?
Are you not going to fulfill your end of the bargain? How about another contract? Isn’t that better?
Killer.
This won’t end well for you.
Vakuu displays his various contracts to the Silent
The Architect is not enough, kill your sisters too!
No need for words, we are the same.
Give yourself to me and you will be feared as much as I.

name: War Historian, Repy
description:
An academic is trapped in a hanging cage next to a treasure chest.

The academic is muttering about “One-Time-Use Keys” while furiously writing something.

Looks like you can unlock the cage or the chest.

choices.name: Unlock the Cage
choices.description: Lose Lantern Key. Obtain History Course.
choices.outcome:
Repy bows in appreciation as you open the cage. He hands you a thick leather tome.

“Those who know not of history are doomed to repeat it. But you seem to know a thing or two about repeats don't you?”

choices.name: Unlock the Chest
choices.description: Lose Lantern Key. Procure 2 random Potions. Obtain 2 random Relics.
choices.outcome:
“Not going to free the scholar, Repy? Based on classic philosophy, you would be considered a moral failure. That's right, maybe consider the LIVING PERSON that is locked up next time! It is not as if there is a valuable member of society in a DIRE PREDICAMENT or anything!!”

“Look, okay, see how small this cage is!? Why am I complaining? You've already made your unscholarly decision... oh, what's inside there? Some potions and relics? Isn't that just great. Just great. Really great for you...”

Repy's eyes follow you with disdain as you walk away.

name: Waterlogged Scriptorium
description:
Navigating the murky passages, you stumble upon a withered figure working a small shop. The multitude of shelves are stuffed full of damp scrolls and parchment.

Noticing a patron has entered, the scribe-shopkeeper snaps to attention and gestures at some implements arranged on a desk.

choices.name: Bloody Ink
choices.description: Gain 6 Max HP.
choices.outcome:
The scribe carefully picks up the vial filled with a bright red ink and gives it a shake, then gestures with their own hand a dipping motion.

You dip your fingers into the ink and a jolt of vitality courses through you!

Pleased with your reaction, the scribe gives a polite bow and waves you goodbye.

choices.name: Prickly Sponge
choices.description: Pay 155 Gold. Enchant 2 cards with Steady.
choices.outcome:
The scribe grabs the prickly sponge (it squeaks) and dabs it across your scrolls.

*squeak squeak squeak*

The prickly texture leaves behind shimmering marks that seem to stabilize the ink...

choices.name: Tentacle Quill
choices.description: Pay 65 Gold. Enchant a card with Steady.
choices.outcome:
The scribe lifts the wriggly quill and with swift, practiced movements, etches a strange mark unto your head.

The mark glows bright, then vanishes...

name: Welcome to Wongo's
description:
“Welcome to Wongo's. We have what you want at Wongtastic prices.” says the least enthusiastic clerk you have ever met.

“Peruse our wares and enjoy your time at Wongo's,” they continue, without even looking up.

choices.name: Wongo's Bargain Bin
choices.description: Pay 100 Gold. Obtain 1 random Common Relic.

choices.name: Wongo's Featured Item
choices.description: Pay 200 Gold. Obtain a random Relic.

choices.name: Leave
choices.description: Downgrade a random card.
choices.outcome:
“Um... excuse me you can't just leave without buying something at Wongo's,” says the clerk with an irritated tone.

You have a heated debate over customer choice and it leaves you mentally drained.

choices.name: Wongo's Mystery Box
choices.description: Pay 300 Gold. Obtain 3 random Relics after 5 combats.

name: Wellspring
description:
You trace a low rumble to its source and find yourself captivated by a tranquil wellspring. The water is an emerald green with clusters of glowing motes.

It looks inviting. What can possibly go wrong?

choices.name: Bathe
choices.description: Remove 1 card from your Deck. Add 1 Guilty to your Deck.
choices.outcome:
You emerge from the pool with a slight feeling of unease.

However, you feel surprisingly refreshed.

choices.name: Bottle
choices.description: Procure 1 random Potion.
choices.outcome:
Bathing in the beautiful water seems suspicious... you decide to bottle some up instead.

This will come in handy.

name: Whispering Hollow
description:
Making your way through a hollow of dead trees you happen upon a single bone-white tree. Clay baubles hang off its branches, which curve inward like protective ribs.

Such a creepy tree. It whispers.

...make exchange.....

choices.name: Exchange Gold
choices.description: Lose 50 Gold. Procure 2 random Potions.
choices.outcome:
You scatter some gold at the base of the tree and two of the clay vessels drop to the floor soundlessly.

They break open, and contain perfectly intact potions within.

You nab the potions and flee.

choices.name: Hug the Tree
choices.description: Lose 9 HP. Choose a card to Transform.
choices.outcome:
The whispering compels you to give it gold but you resist and give the tree a big hug instead!

It thrashes about, scratching you with its branches, but eventually calms down. The tree-hugging experience transforms you.

...make hug.....?

name: Wood Carvings
description:
You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings:

A bird, snake, and... a torus?

A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?

choices.name: Bird
choices.description: Choose 1 starter card to Transform into Peck.
choices.outcome:
You place the bird carving on the pedestal and the statue's EYES LIGHT UP and you hear a faint ringing within your mind.

...caw.... caw caaaawww...

The pedestal opens and a strange fluid begins to pour out.
Naturally, you drink it all.

choices.name: Snake
choices.description: Enchant 1 card with Slither.
choices.outcome: You place the snake carving on the pedestal and the statue's SCALES LIGHT UP! You feel a bit warm, comfortable, and wobbly.
choices.locked: None of your cards can be Enchanted with Slither.

choices.name: Torus
choices.description: Choose 1 starter card to Transform into Toric Toughness.
choices.outcome:
You place the torus carving on the pedestal and your STOMACH LIGHTS UP as the statue transforms into a piping hot fried confection. An insatiable hunger takes over and you quickly consume the donut.

You feel tougher, but slower.

name: Zen Weaver
description:
You walk through a spider web and PANIC!
But then, a wave of calm washes over you...

“Calm down. I need you to quit fussing up my web.”

How did you calm down so quickly?
An itsy bitsy spider abseils down to meet you. It seems willing to impart some techniques for gold.

choices.name: Arachnid Acupuncture
choices.description: Pay 250 Gold. Remove 2 cards from your Deck.
choices.outcome:
“Don't... move...” mutters the miniature spider as its forelegs begin to glow.

Then— in a rush of jabbing motions, pierces you all over!
A sense of weightlessness comes over you. Well worth the money.

choices.name: Breathing Techniques
choices.description: Pay 50 Gold. Add 2 Enlightenment to your Deck.
choices.outcome:
“Visualize your airways staying open... Each breath is meaningful.”

You practice the technique in a way that makes sense to you.

choices.name: Emotional Awareness
choices.description: Pay 125 Gold. Remove 1 card from your Deck.
choices.outcome:
The teeny-weeny spider begins a hypnotic dance and repeatedly chants.

“Thoughts don't affect reality. Panic is the thought-killer. Follow the plan.”

This makes sense to you. Big wise words from a tiny spider.
